tools.name: scan_wallet_risk
tools.description: Return a Mantle wallet risk assessment from a demo fixture.

tools.name: get_wallet_exposure
tools.description: Return known-token balances and exposure source availability.

tools.name: get_rwa_yield_risks
tools.description: Return RWA/yield exposure payload and related limitations.

tools.name: get_evidence_bundle
tools.description: Return evidence bundle for a wallet risk assessment.

tools.name: get_benchmark_history
tools.description: Return local benchmark records. Optional walletHash argument.

tools.name: record_wallet_assessment
tools.description: P0 MCP read-only projection. Returns instructions for REST commit; does not mutate state.
